title: GHL Chat Widget Setup Steps for the Website
description:
Seeking help to please add a chat function to the site using their GHL. He's sent over the API instructions to add this to the site. 

From client:
"Here are the quick steps to add the GoHighLevel live chat widget to our WordPress website:
  1. Log in to the WordPress Admin Dashboard.
  2. Go to Plugins → Add New.
  3. Search for LeadConnector.
  4. Click Install Now, then Activate.
